paper_title: ETHOS: a multi-label hate speech detection dataset
evaluation_method: Binary hate speech classification on the ETHOS dataset containing 998 comments from YouTube and Reddit (565 non-hate-speech, 433 hate-speech), validated via Figure-Eight crowdsourcing. The binary variant classifies comments as containing hate speech (1) or not (0). In lm-evaluation-harness, this is implemented as a generative task where the model generates a classification label. The generated output is compared against the gold label. The paper reports balanced accuracy and weighted F1 as primary metrics, alongside per-class F1 scores.
